scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @muisbakery/api && npm run build -w @muisbakery/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @muisbakery/web && npm run lint -w @muisbakery/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @muisbakery/web && npm run typecheck -w @muisbakery/api
